---
title: "HACCLE: Metaprogramming for Secure Multi-Party Computation"
date: 2021-10-01
year: 2021
pdf: "https://dl.acm.org/doi/pdf/10.1145/3486609.3487205"
venue: "GPCE 2021"
code: "https://github.com/YuyanBao/HACCLE"
slides: "files/slides/gpce2021.pptx"
preprint: "https://arxiv.org/pdf/2009.01489.pdf"
video: "https://youtu.be/D17BL-8Dq0Q"
author:
  - name: Yuyan Bao
  - name: Kirshanthan Sundararajah
  - name: Raghav Malik
  - name: Qianchuan Ye
  - name: Christopher Wagner
  - name: Nouraldin Jaber
  - name: Fei Wang
  - name: Mohammad Hassan Ameri
  - name: Donghang Lu
  - name: Alexander Seto
  - name: Benjamin Delaware
  - name: Roopsha Samanta
  - name: Aniket Kate
  - name: Christina Garman
  - name: Jeremiah Blocki
  - name: Pierre-David Letourneau
  - name: Benoit Meister
  - name: Jonathan Springer
  - name: Tiark Rompf
  - name: Milind Kulkarni
categories:
  - Conference
description: ""
---
